activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Esswell International AB
PO Box 11486
Södra Hamngatan 19-21
SE-40430, GÖTEBORG
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB
PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' from Sweden in the certificate is explicitly found in the invoice header and address blocks with allowed normalization (case, legal form AB, address format). Land matches as 'Sweden'. Hence MATCH based on 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur) and legal form normalization 4.1.3.6.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Guopeiyun' with address in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia from the certificate is identically matched in the invoice's Customer/Applicant and address blocks with exact country Ethiopia. Invoice has no conflicting consignee data. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872
goods_description.invoice_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit invoice reference (number 508890, date 2023-01-11) matching invoice reference 508890 and related details. The exact goods description string in certificate matches invoice description after normalization (case, punctuation). Hence MATCH under rule 4.3.5.

quantity.invoice_value:
97.951 ADMT
264 Rolls
132 Packages
96.942 MT gross weight
quantity.motivation: Quantity values in certificate (97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages) are identically found in invoice quantities after allowed normalization (e.g. decimal and spacing). Quantities are expressed in compatible units; no contradictions found. Therefore MATCH.

origin.motivation: Origin 'USA' in certificate is explicitly stated in the invoice under 'Country of Origin' field. Normalization applied for case and formatting. No contradictory origins in invoice. MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) matched successfully with valid normalization and no contradictions found. The documents can be approved automatically.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
